# UC-13.6.11 · Grafana LDAP and OAuth Team Sync Failure Events

## Description

Identity sync failures strand new hires without dashboard access and can leave stale group memberships in regulated environments. Centralizing LDAP/OAuth errors accelerates IdP cutovers and surfaces certificate or clock skew issues.

## Value

Prevents productivity loss after directory changes and tightens access consistency across HA Grafana nodes.

## Implementation

Tag `auth_provider` (`ldap`, `azuread`, `okta`). Correlate with IdP health dashboards. Alert on sustained `count` growth versus 7-day baseline, not single blips.

## SPL

```spl
index=observability sourcetype="grafana:log" (ldap OR oauth OR oidc OR "team sync")
| search "error" OR "failed" OR "invalid_grant" OR "unable to authenticate" OR "connection reset"
| stats count, latest(_time) as t, values(logger) as loggers by auth_provider, host
| where count >= 10
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Timechart by provider, table of error signatures, link to IdP incident tickets.

## References

- [Grafana — Authentication](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/setup-grafana/configure-security/configure-authentication/)
